name: Synthia MQTT
description: MQTT integration layer for Synthia Core

docker_groups.name: MQTT Tools
docker_groups.description: Optional MQTT CLI helper container for diagnostics and manual inspection.

docker_groups.name: MQTT Observer
docker_groups.description: Optional observer sidecar for broker diagnostics and event snapshots.

docker_groups.name: MQTT Replay
docker_groups.description: Optional replay worker for retained message analysis and troubleshooting.
